subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy letter dated 17 Jamádiyu'l-Avval was received, and its contents were noted in detail [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه مورخ به ۱۷ جمادی الاول رسید و بر تفاصیل اطلاع حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @poems and quotation from poetry
